title: MrEnderNerd's Throwable Mace
description: This makes the Mace more OP by letting you be able to throw it like a trident.
body:
- This makes the Mace more OP by letting you be able to throw it like a trident.

> How To Throw The Mace: Sneak & Right-Click With The Mace Selected.

This datapack is pretty simple but was hard to code for some reason, Anyway enjoy the datapack :)

**Shader Complementary Unbound: https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound**

**Shader Settings: https://www.mediafire.com/file/9sf47els3nc4220/ComplementaryUnbound_r5.0.1.zip.txt/file﻿**
